DEFS LINDA FELIX, ARIEL PAYON AND MARILYN FELIX LUM ARE TO VACATE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 16 APRIL 2001 AT WHICH TIME DEF WILL RECEIVE $27,000. RENTS WILL BE WAIVED DURING THIS PERIOD. EACH PARTY WILL RELEASE THE OTHERS FROM ALL CLAIMS. DEFS WILL COOPERATE WITH PLNTF IN CONSTRUCTION PROJECTS UPON 24 HOUR NOTICE.
